AddAttachmentsToSet.name: AddAttachmentsToSet
AddAttachmentsToSet.description: Grants permission to add one or more attachments to an AWS Support case

AddCommunicationToCase.name: AddCommunicationToCase
AddCommunicationToCase.description: Grants permission to add a customer communication to an AWS Support case

CreateCase.name: CreateCase
CreateCase.description: Grants permission to creates a new AWS Support case

DescribeAttachment.name: DescribeAttachment
DescribeAttachment.description: Grants permission to describe attachment detail

DescribeCaseAttributes.name: DescribeCaseAttributes
DescribeCaseAttributes.description: Grants permission to allow secondary services to read AWS Support case attributes.This is an internally managed function

DescribeCaseOptions.name: DescribeCaseOptions
DescribeCaseOptions.description: Grants permission to describe the available options for a single AWS Support case. This is an internally managed function

DescribeCases.name: DescribeCases
DescribeCases.description: Grants permission to list AWS Support cases that matches the given inputs

DescribeCommunication.name: DescribeCommunication
DescribeCommunication.description: Grants permission to get a single communication and attachments for a single AWS Support case

DescribeCommunications.name: DescribeCommunications
DescribeCommunications.description: Grants permission to list the communications and attachments for one or more AWS Support cases

DescribeCreateCaseOptions.name: DescribeCreateCaseOptions
DescribeCreateCaseOptions.description: Grants permission to describes the available options for creating a support case

DescribeIssueTypes.name: DescribeIssueTypes
DescribeIssueTypes.description: Grants permission to return issue types for AWS Support cases

DescribeServices.name: DescribeServices
DescribeServices.description: Grants permission to list AWS services and categories that applies to each service

DescribeSeverityLevels.name: DescribeSeverityLevels
DescribeSeverityLevels.description: Grants permission to list severity levels that can be assigned to an AWS Support case

DescribeSupportLevel.name: DescribeSupportLevel
DescribeSupportLevel.description: Grants permission to return the support level for an AWS Account identifier

DescribeSupportedLanguages.name: DescribeSupportedLanguages
DescribeSupportedLanguages.description: Grants permission to describes the available support languages for a given category code, service code and issue type

DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckRefreshStatus.name: DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckRefreshStatuses
DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckRefreshStatus.description: Grants permission to get the status of a Trusted Advisor refresh check based on a list of check identifiers

DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckResult.name: DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckResult
DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckResult.description: Grants permission to get the results of the Trusted Advisor check that has the specified check identifier

DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckSummaries.name: DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckSummaries
DescribeTrustedAdvisorCheckSummaries.description: Grants permission to get the summaries of the results of the Trusted Advisor checks that have the specified check identifiers

DescribeTrustedAdvisorChecks.name: DescribeTrustedAdvisorChecks
DescribeTrustedAdvisorChecks.description: Grants permission to get a list of all available Trusted Advisor checks, including name, identifier, category and description

GetInteraction.name: GetInteraction
GetInteraction.description: Grants permission to retrieve personalized troubleshooting assistance for account and technical issues for a specific interaction

InitiateCallForCase.name: InitiateCallForCase
InitiateCallForCase.description: Grants permission to initiate a call on AWS Support Center. This is an internally managed function

InitiateChatForCase.name: InitiateChatForCase
InitiateChatForCase.description: Grants permission to initiate a chat on AWS Support Center.This is an internally managed function

InitiateLiveContactForCase.name: InitiateLiveContactForCase
InitiateLiveContactForCase.description: Grants permission to initiate a live contact on AWS Support Center. This is an internally managed function

ListInteractionEntries.name: ListInteractionEntries
ListInteractionEntries.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of entries within a specific interaction, including messages, status updates, or other relevant data points

ListInteractions.name: ListInteractions
ListInteractions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of interactions, potentially with filters or pagination

PutCaseAttributes.name: PutCaseAttributes
PutCaseAttributes.description: Grants permission to allow secondary services to attach attributes to AWS Support cases. This is an internally managed function

RateCaseCommunication.name: RateCaseCommunication
RateCaseCommunication.description: Grants permission to rate an AWS Support case communication

RefreshTrustedAdvisorCheck.name: RefreshTrustedAdvisorCheck
RefreshTrustedAdvisorCheck.description: Grants permission to requests a refresh of the Trusted Advisor check that has the specified check identifier

ResolveCase.name: ResolveCase
ResolveCase.description: Grants permission to resolve an AWS Support case

ResolveInteraction.name: ResolveInteraction
ResolveInteraction.description: Grants permission to mark a specific interaction as resolved by its unique identifier, indicating that the issue has been addressed and no further action is needed

SearchForCases.name: SearchForCases
SearchForCases.description: Grants permission to return a list of AWS Support cases that matches the given inputs

StartInteraction.name: StartInteraction
StartInteraction.description: Grants permission to start a specific interaction to receive personalized troubleshooting assistance for account and technical issues

UpdateCaseSeverity.name: UpdateCaseSeverity
UpdateCaseSeverity.description: Grants permission to update the severity for a single AWS Support case. This is an internally managed function

UpdateInteraction.name: UpdateInteraction
UpdateInteraction.description: Grants permission to update a specific interaction to receive personalized troubleshooting assistance for account and technical issues
